# Erogram

> Erogram.pro is the #1 verified directory for discovering NSFW Telegram groups, channels, and AI companion bots. Updated daily with new community submissions.

## Sections

- [Groups Directory](https://erogram.pro/groups): Browse thousands of NSFW Telegram groups by category, country, and popularity
- [Bots Directory](https://erogram.pro/bots): Discover AI companion bots and interactive Telegram bots
- [Top Lists](https://erogram.pro/best-telegram-groups): Curated best-of lists by category (Lesbian, Hentai, Amateur, Asian, MILF, BDSM, Cosplay, and more)
- [Articles & Guides](https://erogram.pro/articles): In-depth articles about Telegram communities, safety tips, and platform guides
- [Submit a Group or Bot](https://erogram.pro/add): Community submissions — users can add their own Telegram group or bot

## Key Facts

- 10,000+ active Telegram groups listed
- 500+ AI and interactive bots
- 150+ countries represented
- All listings are verified and moderated
- Free to browse — no account required
- Content is rated RTA (Restricted To Adults)

## Categories

Groups and bots are organized into categories including: Amateur, Anal, Asian, BDSM, Big Ass, Cosplay, Dating, Gay, Hentai, Lesbian, MILF, Onlyfans, Roleplay, Threesome, and many more.

## How It Works

1. Users browse or search for groups/bots by category, country, or keyword
2. Each listing shows a description, member count, category, and country
3. Clicking "Join" redirects the user to the Telegram app to join the group or start the bot
4. Users can submit their own groups/bots for review and approval

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js (server-side rendered for fast page loads)
- Pages are updated via ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration)
- Sitemap: https://erogram.pro/sitemap.xml

## Contact

- Email: erogrampro@gmail.com
- Telegram: https://t.me/erogrampro
